description: Standard contract for authoring AI context pack files with deterministic section structure and high signal-to-noise guidance.

requiredSections.heading: ## Purpose
requiredSections.requiredContent: What decision or execution context this pack is designed to provide.

requiredSections.heading: ## When To Use
requiredSections.requiredContent: Task shapes and triggers where this pack should be selected.

requiredSections.heading: ## When Not To Use
requiredSections.requiredContent: Out-of-scope tasks and stop conditions that should route elsewhere.

requiredSections.heading: ## Invariants
requiredSections.requiredContent: Stable rules and constraints that must not be violated.

requiredSections.heading: ## Authoritative Docs
requiredSections.requiredContent: Canonical docs paths this pack defers to for source-of-truth behavior.

requiredSections.heading: ## Authoritative Code Paths
requiredSections.requiredContent: Primary implementation paths to consult before editing behavior.

requiredSections.heading: ## Anti-Patterns
requiredSections.requiredContent: Known failure modes and incorrect patterns to avoid.

requiredSections.heading: ## Related Packs
requiredSections.requiredContent: Adjacent pack IDs and why they should be combined or preferred.

optionalSections.heading: ## Retrieval Order
optionalSections.requiredContent: Ordered retrieval sequence when multiple authoritative sources exist.

optionalSections.heading: ## Change Triggers
optionalSections.requiredContent: Events that require pack updates, such as renamed docs or contract changes.

signalToNoiseRules: Link to canonical sources instead of duplicating long explanations.
Prefer stable repository paths and explicit pack IDs over narrative prose.
